summary: Tested WebSocket and Churn Prediction features. Fixed critical bug in churn routes where role-based access control was checking JWT payload instead of database user role. All 16 tests passed after fix.

bugs_fixed.issue: Role-based access control was checking current_user.get('role') from JWT payload, but JWT doesn't include role. Fixed by fetching user from database to get role.

critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket manager correctly implements subscribe/broadcast pattern for real-time auction updates
Churn service calculates risk score (0-100) based on behavioral metrics: inactivity, engagement change, spend patterns
Win-back offers are correctly selected based on risk level (high/medium/low)
AI analysis integration uses Claude via Emergent LLM Key for churn insights
context_for_next_testing_agent: WebSocket and Churn features fully tested. WebSocket endpoints: /api/ws/stats (GET), /api/ws/auction/{id} (WS), /api/ws/auctions (WS). Churn endpoints: /api/churn/my-status, /api/churn/analyze/{user_id}, /api/churn/dashboard, /api/churn/trigger-winback, /api/churn/claim-offer, /api/churn/campaigns. All role-based access control now correctly fetches user from database.

mocked_apis.AI_Features: LIVE - Using Claude API via Emergent LLM Key

websocket_auction_endpoint.details: WebSocket endpoint accepts connections, sends auction state, handles ping/pong

websocket_global_endpoint.details: Global WebSocket endpoint for all auction updates

churn_analyze.details: Returns detailed risk analysis with metrics, AI insights, win_back_offer

churn_dashboard.details: Returns risk_distribution, total_at_risk, churned_60d, high_risk_users, recent_campaigns

churn_trigger_winback.details: Creates win-back campaign with offer, awards bonus points, sends notification

churn_claim_offer.details: User claims active win-back offer, marks as claimed

auction_bid_websocket_broadcast.details: Bid placement triggers asyncio.create_task for WebSocket broadcast to subscribers

churn_risk_calculation.details: Risk score (0-100) calculated from: inactivity (40pts), engagement decline (25pts), spend decline (15pts), points hoarding (10pts), AI adjustment (10pts)
